title: Pre-Baseline Screen
scientificQuestion: Can failure analysis of a rejected discovery candidate produce a stronger, baseline-resistant, counterexample-aware discovery search strategy?
domain: candidate rejection and new discovery search
limitations: Only safe public computational, data, package-metadata, and formal-sequence targets were used.
The rejected Receipt-Stable Descriptor Residual Candidate is not revived or rebranded as a discovery candidate.
New candidates must pass baselines, counterexamples, holdouts, replay, and kill week before any stronger status.
Network endpoints can change; replay caveats are documented where source stability is not guaranteed.
disclaimer: Bounded safe computational search only. No outside-party validation, uptake, prize-level claim, broad autonomous-intelligence claim, medical/legal/wet-lab capability, hazardous capability, breakthrough claim, or universal validity is claimed.
